name: R-8 component-add rejects a --default-color token id that is not present in the registry
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/component-add.sh" --name Button --default-color color.never.existed 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'not in registry' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
